$comment: v0.9 — auth config. Local accounts are always on. AD is opt-in via ad.enabled. AD users in the configured allowedGroup (default 'visitas-world') can log in and become hosts. Local takes precedence on username collisions, so the bootstrap admin always works even if AD is unreachable.

ad.$comment_searchFilter: objectCategory=person + objectClass=user excludes machine accounts (computer objects). Adjust to your AD schema if needed; OpenLDAP / FreeIPA use uid= instead of sAMAccountName=.
ad.$comment_allowedGroup: Substring (case-insensitive) match against each memberOf DN. Set to '' to allow any AD user to log in (rare).
